case_title: CATHERINE WILLIAMSON VS. FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMSON, CATHERINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P SCHREIBER. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMSON, CATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00, THE COURT FINDS TAHT DEFENDANT BREACHED ITS CONTRACT OF CARRIAGE WITH RESPECT TO OBTAINING A DIRECT SIGNATURE FOR ALL EIGHT PACKAGES, AND THAT THE PLAINTIFF SUSTAINED DAMAGES PROXIMATELY CAUSED BY THIS BREACH IN EXESS OF THE CONTRACTUAL LIMITATION OF LIABILTY OF $1400.000 APPLICABLE TO THIS CASE. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF IS LIMITED TO DAMAGES OF $1400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY WILLIAMSON, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMSON, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2008 - JUDGMENT. CLERK-BETH WILBER
